ValidationRule.description: Project, work date, hours, category, role, and pool are required for a valid time line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( ISBLANK(Project__c), ISBLANK(Work_Date__c), ISBLANK(Hours__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Task_Category__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Job_Role__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Labor_Pool__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Project, work date, hours, task category, job role, and labor pool are required.
